creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text: https://dev.gentoo.org/~whissi/mozilla/patchsets/firefox-93-patches-01.tar.xz doesn't have a fix as the patch is conditionally disabled per REQUIRED_USE="debug? ( !system-av1 )". Doing the same is kinda pointless because the MOZ_ASSERT line is elided in non-debug (release) builds and the condition within is always true as aom_image_t no longer has room for alpha i.e., stride[4] -> stride[3].
